examples: These unassignable animals include a large swimming predator called Anomalocaris and a soft-bodied animal called Wiwaxia, which ate detritus or algae.
Indeed, with the deaths of so many other animals and with much dead plant material, the food chain based on detritus would have been well-supplied.
There is no guano comparable in fertility with the detritus of a capital.
Graffiti covers the walls, and party detritus is scattered across the floor where office workers once walked.
It is populated by cultural detritus and ephemera with which we are friendly, if you will.
